release_notes:
### ShibaClaw v0.3.3 🐾

- **Fix**: Final build fix for GitHub releases. Ensures all integration channels (Telegram, Slack, etc.) are correctly bundled in the Windows executable.
- **Fix**: Resolved local versioning bug where the build was stuck on v0.2.1.
upgrade_notes: Update to v0.3.3. This is the definitive fixed build for Windows.

changes.note: Fixed CI to install all-channels extras.
